title: Intensely Sweet Russian Cherry Wrap
description: A sweet and creamy Russian dish featuring ground sugar and smoked hot flavors, all wrapped in a corn husk vessel, perfect for adventurous eaters looking for a dairy-free friendly treat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Soak the corn husks in water for at least 30 minutes to make them pliable.
In a blender or food processor, puree the smoked cherries, coconut cream, lemon juice, vanilla extract, smoked paprika, and salt until smooth.
In a separate bowl, mix together the ground sugar and a pinch of salt.
To assemble the wraps, lay a corn husk flat and spoon some of the cherry mixture onto the center of the husk.
Sprinkle some of the sugar mixture over the cherry mixture.
Fold the sides of the corn husk over the filling and then roll the wrap up tightly.
Place the wraps on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the corn husks are lightly browned and the filling is warm and creamy.
